arts.ttl: From Brazil: Willian in talks with 2 Premier League clubs – Not returning to Fulham, Arsenal or Chelsea
arts.sum: Willian loves the Premier League, even at the ripe old age of 36. Having been at Chelsea, Arsenal and Fulham, the Brazilian is now negotiating a return to Premier League football, but TNT Brazil say it’s not for any of those London clubs he’s already represented. arts.ttl: Sources: West Ham in talks with OM over Wahi
arts.sum: West Ham United are in active talks with Marseille for the potential transfer of striker Elye Wahi, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Fulham team news LIVE! Potter set for PL Hammers bow
arts.sum: “We scored a good goal from Rodrigo, it was a good finish from him,” Silva said when asked about Muniz’s first-time finish into the bottom right corner. Marco Silva is relishing the competition between Fulham’s striking options after Rodrigo Muniz and Raul Jimenez got among the goals in their 4-1 victory over Watford in the third round of the FA Cup at Craven Cottage.
